component.name: Automa
Automa
component.summary: Control panel for the LNXlink MQTT agent
Painel de controle para o agente MQTT LNXlink

description.p: Automa is a GTK4/libadwaita control panel for LNXlink, the MQTT agent that integrates your Linux desktop with Home Assistant. No terminal needed — configure everything from a clean GNOME interface.

ul.li: Start, stop and restart the LNXlink service with a single click
Configure your MQTT broker connection — host, port and credentials
Enable or disable individual sensors such as CPU, memory, camera and bluetooth
Create custom commands triggerable from Home Assistant automations
Set the device name shown in Home Assistant
Configure autostart on login for both the app and the service
Follows GNOME accent color and dark/light theme automatically

screenshot.caption: Dashboard showing LNXlink service status and controls
Sensor management — enable or disable individual modules

ul.li: GTK4/libadwaita interface for LNXlink MQTT agent
Service control — start, stop and restart
Sensor management with auto-restart on toggle
GNOME Shell extension with top bar status indicator
